text:
HTML/CSS Online Test - TestDome

TestDome offers an online HTML/CSS assessment designed to evaluate practical web development skills.

For Jobseekers: Users can practice and earn certificates by scoring in the top 25% of test-takers.

For Companies: Organizations can screen candidates starting at '$7 per candidate' while detecting potential AI assistance through proctoring technology.

Assessment Content: The test evaluates competencies including: HTML element definition and CSS styling application; Form creation for data collection; Responsive web design implementation.

According to the page, 'A good Web front-end developer or UI/UX developer needs a solid understanding of HTML and CSS in order to create and style web pages and user interfaces.'

Sample Questions: The platform provides 12 public practice questions ranging from easy to hard difficulty (5-20 minutes each), covering topics like menu spacing, semantic HTML, form validation, animations, and positioning.

Additional Resources: TestDome offers 38 premium questions beyond the free samples, covers 24+ specific skills, and serves roles including UI/UX developer and web front-end developer positions.
